☁ Cloud Storage
Setup — Free Supabase Database (2 min)
1. Go to supabase.com → New Project (free)
2. In SQL Editor, run this once:
create table if not exists gg_store ( key text primary key, value text, updated_at timestamptz default now() ); alter table gg_store enable row level security; create policy "anon all" on gg_store for all using (true) with check (true);
3. Settings → API → copy Project URL and anon key below
☁ Cloud saves lean state (~50–300KB) · 📎 Media (screenshots) stays local · 🔒 Only your anon key is stored in localStorage · Free Supabase tier handles unlimited saves

⚡ HIGH IMPACT NEWS TODAY?
  • Can I trade today? Gate
    • Why can you trade today?
    Fill this to confirm your availability — checklist will not complete without it

  • Check economic calendar — mark high impact events News
  • Identify 4H candle context — which candle are we in?

  • Mark current day H/L as LQ targets on all pairs Day LQ

⚠ EOD REVIEW MISSED — Window passed without submission.
  • Close or move all open positions to breakeven

  • Screenshot all setups — taken and missed

    Did you override the checklist at any point?
    Did you move a stop or exit early due to fear/greed?
    Did you hesitate at a valid entry and miss it?

  • Verify R-tally — R figure matches actual cash outcome Risk
  • One thing done well + one thing to improve tomorrow
  • Reset session checklist ready for tomorrow

Morning & EOD
Trading Setup Analysis Framework
Multi-Timeframe Validation & Entry Confirmation Reference
EURUSD · EURJPY · GBPJPY · GBPUSD · AUDUSD · USDCAD · USDCHF
4H → 30M → 5M → 1M
EAT (UTC+3)
§1 Setup Overview Define and validate the setup before any lower timeframe work begins
Setup Type & Context
Define the setup type, directional bias, and the structural reasoning that led to identifying this opportunity. Choose: RPC / LQ Setup / Pre-BOS Anchor / Close at POI.
Validation
What makes this setup valid right now? Confirm all confluences are active and aligned across timeframes. 4H bias must match 30M structure direction without exception.
Invalidations
What would kill this setup? Define your hard line — price levels, candle closes, or structural breaks that void the trade. Write these down before entering.
Pivot Conditions
When would you switch to the opposing setup, which setup would you switch to, and what are its own invalidations? Identify pivot conditions before the trade triggers.
Variation + Session & Timing
Which variant is active (VAR1–4 / London Sweep / Midday Sweep)? Which session and 4H candle? How many candles have elapsed? What is the specific trigger event?
Watch For
Targets, opposing buildups, and time expiration. Note what could form against you and at what point the setup expires if price hasn't moved.
LQ Setup 📚
⚡ Must sweep LQ or have structural violation · Valid signal candle or candle buildup required
Context: Structural violation (MS/CHoCH/BOS) from previous or current day + tap into external POI.
✓ Valid: LQ swept OR structural violation · Valid signal candle OR candle buildup · 30M CHoCH confirmation
✗ Invalid: LQ not swept AND no violation · Invalid signal candle · No buildup
⟲ Pivot: To RPC — valid range + internal POI tap · To Pre-BOS — after LQ sweep breaks next structure
External POILQ Sweep30M CHoCHVAR1–4
RPC 📚
⚡ Requires clear range + valid pullback to internal POI · Signal candle or candle buildup required
Context: After structural violation → clear range created → pullback to internal POI (previous or current day).
✓ Valid: Clear range present · Pullback to POI confirmed · Valid signal candle OR buildup · 30M CHoCH
✗ Invalid: No clear range · Pullback not confirmed · Invalid candle · Failed swing buildup
⟲ Pivot: To Failed Swing — when failed swing building up · To Pre-BOS Anchor — when structure leaves anchor
Internal POIClear Range30M CHoCHBuildup
Pre-BOS Anchor 📚
⚡ Must sweep a swing or have a structure violation before anchor setup is valid
Context: Current day confirms/partially/fully creates anchor for HTF structure violation. Watch 30M POI that led to 4H break.
✓ Valid: Swing swept OR structure violation · Anchor present or forming · Swept previous candle before break
✗ Invalid: No swing swept AND no violation · Anchor not present · Opposing buildup with valid signal candle
⟲ Pivot: To LQ — signal + valid CHoCH tested first · Add Pre-BOS pivot after LQ sweep breaks next structure
Pre-BOSSwing SweepHTF AnchorTight SL
Close at POI 📚
⚡ Previous day must have closed in a breakout — confirm before using this setup
Context: Previous day closes in breakout at POI → next day provides setup. Sub-types: NDCS and Failed Swing.
✓ NDCS Valid: Previous day breakout close confirmed · New day confirms swing by 1st or Asian candle
✓ Failed Swing: Valid initial swing · 30M weak swing / equal swings · No pivot conditions
⟲ Pivot: To RPC — signal + no weak swing · To Failed Swing — new failed swing created
Breakout ClosePOI CloseNDCSFailed Swing
§2 30M Validation Framework Structural context, HOD/LOD confirmation, bias alignment, and candle reaction assessment at the 30M level
1
Deep 30M Structure Context & Markup HOD/LOD
What is the overall 30M structure context and markup that leads to identifying a valid HOD/LOD? Map the full structural sequence — identify all CHoCH and BOS points. Note which session created the High/Low: First Candle / Asian / London / Midday / New York. The HOD/LOD session determines timing context for the whole setup.
2
HOD/LOD Lock 30M POI
Do you have a valid CHoCH/MS locking in the H/LOD? Identify which kind of buildup is present and confirm the 30M POI. The POI is the zone price must return to for a valid entry.
3
Valid Trendline AOC
What trendline variation do you have and does it align with the pullback variation? More than one trendline can be used to create a strong Area of Confluence (AOC). The AOC strengthens the 30M POI location.
4
Sweep Assessment 4H + 30M
What has to be swept on 4H and 30M, and do these sweeps support your bias? Sweeps on both timeframes that align with your directional bias add significant probability to the setup.
5
Pullback Assessment
Do you have a valid fractal or an acceptable weak swing? Identify the kind of pullback and buildup present. The pullback type determines which variation (VAR1–4) is active and shapes your entry approach.
6
Opposing Buildup Decision Point
Is there an opposing buildup? Does 4H alignment support your setup? Determine which trigger fires first — initial setup or the opposing buildup — and make your decision before price reaches the POI.
7
Retest Status Critical
Has the POI been retested? If not, determine which fires first — the initial retest or the opposing setup. A retested POI loses its edge. Fresh, unvisited POIs carry the highest probability.
8
30M Candle Reaction Resweep / Failure
Assess the 30M candle reaction at the POI. Is price showing a valid resweep (liquidity taken before the actual move) or a failure (candle breaks structure)? A confirmed resweep signals the POI is holding — a failure signals the move may be false or a deeper retest is needed. This assessment feeds directly into 5M refinement.
9
Why This POI? POI Justification
Before proceeding to refinement, articulate clearly why you chose this specific POI over any other level. Consider: buildup location, fractal quality, trendline confluence, sweep context, and how this level compares to alternatives. If you cannot explain it, you should not trade it. This reasoning must be documented in the checklist before the section can be locked.
§3 5M Refinement Framework Adjust the 30M POI to a precise 5M BB/OB+Gap after deep 5M structure — mark all relevant and valid POIs
1
30M POI → 5M BB/OB+Gap Deep 5M Structure Required
Adjust the 30M POI to a 5M BB/OB+Gap zone after reading deep 5M structure. Do not just overlay the 30M level — let the 5M structure guide you to the precise entry zone. Mark all relevant and valid POIs within the broader 30M zone. The combined OB+Gap is the execution level; both must overlap. A gap without the OB body or an OB without the gap is not a valid combined POI. 5M POI can be further refined to a 1M POI if needed.
2
30M TL → 5M Level Buildup TL or Pullback TL
Refine the 30M trendline to the 5M equivalent — validate whether it is a 30M buildup TL (confirming the structural buildup on the way to the POI) or a pullback TL (confirming the pullback variation). If no clear entry trendline is visible from the buildup pattern, watch for a pullback TL to form. No clear entry TL = watch for pullback TL according to buildup behaviour.
3
30M Candle Reaction Resweep / Failure
At the refined POI, assess the 30M candle reaction — is price showing a resweep (liquidity taken before the actual move) or a failure (candle breaks structure)? A confirmed resweep signals the POI is holding. A failure changes the scenario — identify the new POI or step back. This assessment must be made before entering the entry confirmation phase.
4
30M Buildup Watch — Immediate POI ⚠ Close Watch
Maintain a close watch on 30M buildup as price approaches the POI. Has an immediate 30M POI been created within the broader zone? The immediate POI formed during refinement is the highest-priority level — this is where the actual trigger will come from. Never lose sight of it once identified. Multiple retests may occur before the actual 3D forms — do not pre-empt.
5
5M 3D Variation — Type
3D tap at POI, or valid swing connection? A tap at POI means price touches the refined zone and reacts immediately. A swing connection means price pulls through slightly before the 3D forms. Know which type you're looking for before price arrives.
6
5M 3D Variation — Location 5M POI + Fractal
5M POI (OB/BB + 30M TL) + fractal confirmed? The 3D pattern must form at the confluence of the 5M OB, the 30M trendline, and a valid fractal. All three elements together create the strongest entry location.
7
Resweep / Failure Assessment LQ + Violation Direction
Assess the possibility of resweep or failure: what is the LQ for the next POI / candle break? What direction does the 1M/5M violation point toward? If violation is against your bias, reassess before entry. A resweep that clears LQ and then returns is a high-probability signal. A failure that does not resweep suggests the move may be premature.
§4 Entry Confirmation Framework The 1M/5M OB + Gap combination is the combined POI for execution — all elements must align
⚡
Execution Adjustment: The primary entry zone is the combined OB + Gap. However, an OB alone is valid for entry when a gap is present but small enough to be considered negligible — in that case, add the gap as part of the zone. If the gap is wide, do not use it — a wide gap signals a low-probability inefficiency that may not fill cleanly. Never execute on a gap alone without the OB body alignment. The OB provides the structural anchor; the gap qualifies it. Rule: OB always required. Small gap = include. Wide gap = skip.
1
1M/5M POI Formation OB + Gap Combined
Has a new 1M/5M POI been identified as the combined OB + FVG (Gap) zone? The OB provides the structural anchor and the Gap fills the inefficiency. Entry is only valid when both the OB body and the Gap overlap at the same price level. This combined zone is your execution POI.
2
Buildup Watch + Immediate POI ⚠ Critical Watch
Identify buildup forming at or near the combined OB+Gap zone. Cross-reference against the 30M buildup chart. Maintain close watch on the immediate POI identified during 5M refinement — this remains the primary level. The buildup should be forming directly at or within this zone, not above or below it.
3
Pullback Assessment Quick / Intermediate / Delayed
Assess the pullback type and select the matching entry approach:
Quick — 5M fractal + retest (tight range pullback, fastest reaction required at OB+Gap)
Intermediate — 5M candle + 3D (more confirmation time, monitor buildup closely)
Delayed — 30M candle + 3D (use 1M TradingView chart aligned with MetaTrader for precision entry)
4
OB + Gap + Fib Circle + Buildup TL 4 of 4
Are all four elements aligned at the execution POI? OB + Gap (the combined 1M/5M POI) + Fib Circle + Buildup Trendline. Full size only when all 4 align. Partial size (50–75%) acceptable with 3 of 4. Never full size with 2 or fewer.
5
Entry Method
Execute on retest of the combined OB+Gap zone, or on a 1M 3D pattern that forms within the zone. The 1M 3D must form inside the combined POI — not ahead of it or after it. A 3D forming outside the zone is not a valid trigger.
6
Position & Risk
Size, stop, and target confirmed before execution. Stop is placed beyond the OB+Gap zone (not mid-zone). Target is the next structural liquidity level. Risk-reward minimum 1:2 before entry — if R:R is below 1:2, skip the trade.
7
News Check Hard Block
No high-impact news within 15 minutes ahead. No 4H liquidity pool in the path between entry and target. If either condition exists — do not enter. Move existing positions to breakeven if news is imminent.
§5 Trade Management Active management rules — opposing POI + 30M candle reaction actively watching during the trade
⚡
Management Adjustment: During an active trade, continue to monitor the opposing POI from refinement and the 30M candle reaction. If price returns toward the refined opposing POI from profit, treat it as a potential structure shift signal — assess whether to take partial profits or move to breakeven at that level, not just at mechanical 1:1 R.
Opposing POI + 30M Candle Reaction Active Watch
Keep the opposing POI identified during 5M refinement on close watch. Cross-reference with the 30M candle reaction — if price retraces toward that zone from profit and the candle reaction confirms a shift, this is a decision point to take partials or move to breakeven. Do not ignore the opposing POI once in trade.
Opposing Structure
Cross-check 30M current structure continuously for opposing setups forming while you are in trade. If an opposing buildup develops at a key structural level, assess whether to take partial profits or exit.
Breakeven — News
Move to breakeven ahead of any high-impact news event. Do not hold through news with an open stop. If already in significant profit, consider closing fully before news rather than risking a reversion to entry.
Breakeven — Structure
Move to breakeven in line with 30M and 5M structure. When price breaks a key 30M structure level in your favour, move stop to entry. When price breaks the next level, trail the stop. Let structure dictate stop movement, not arbitrary pip counts.
Partial Take
Take 50% off at the nearest opposing structural POI or liquidity level. Let the remaining 50% run to the full target with a trailing stop aligned to 30M structure. Do not move the partial take target closer than the first opposing structural level.
EOD Review
Organise and review all trades by 23:00 EAT. All positions must be at breakeven or closed. No unmanaged trades overnight. Log every trade regardless of outcome — wins and losses both require documentation.
REF Entry Trigger & Management Reference Read-only reference — these are the conditions and framework rules applied during active trading
Entry Trigger Checklist
Valid reaction (near/tap) + valid 5M 3D (type: swing or collection) + location (valid 5M POI) + fractal + fail/sweep assessment + violation direction confirmed
30M Context Assessment
30M reaction + buildup + TL + POI + timing/pullback assessment + candle level + entry method + circle (Fib)
Execute at AOC
Execute only when all AOC elements are aligned at the execution zone.
AOC = Candle Level / TL / Fib Circle / OB+Gap
Trade Filter
No news + No new 4H LQ in path (risky sweep) + Valid 30M reaction at trendline. All three must be clear before executing.
📌 NB — Key Reminders
AOCAOC = Candle Level / TL / Fib Circle / OB+Gap. All confluence elements must overlap at the entry zone.
1M5M POI can be refined to 1M POI for tighter execution. Use 1M TradingView chart aligned with MetaTrader.
TLNo clear entry trendline from buildup — watch for pullback TL to form. Do not force a TL that isn't there.
3DMultiple retests may occur before the actual 3D forms. Be patient. Do not pre-empt the trigger.
QUICKQuick entry: 5M fractal + retest. Fast reaction needed at OB+Gap zone.
INTIntermediate entry: 5M candle + 3D. More time for confirmation, monitor buildup closely.
DELAYDelayed entry: 30M candle + 3D. Use 1M TV aligned with MT for precise execution.
INV Invalidation Triggers — Exit Immediately These conditions override all other decisions. No hesitation.
EXITPrice breaks the defined invalidation level — close immediately, no second-guessing.
VOIDA candle closes beyond the combined OB+Gap POI on the 5M — the setup structure is broken.
PIVOTOpposing buildup triggers before your setup — reassess and consider switching to the opposing trade.
WAIT4H LQ ahead is not cleared — hold entry or exit if already in, until the path is clear.
BE/CLOSENews event imminent — move to breakeven or close the position before the event.
REASSESS1M/5M violation in the opposite direction — the immediate POI is showing rejection of your bias.
§6 Session Schedule — 4H Trading Windows (EAT UTC+3) 6 mandatory check-in windows · 4H closes at 01 / 05 / 09 / 13 / 17 / 21 EAT
C1–C2
03:00–11:59
Pre-Session — Context & Prep
Review overnight PA · Mark 30M structure & HOD/LOD · Identify 4H context · Complete morning routine. No active trading. Asian high/low forms — mark as liquidity targets.
CONFIRM
12:00–13:00
Window 1 — Confirmation Phase Check-in: 10–30 min in
Asian setups · Late London sweep · Var1 confirmed setups · New swing with late London LQ sweep · Must align 4H candle cross · No counter-trading at POI close. Binary YES/NO only. No new analysis.
PREP
13:00–16:00
Window 2 — Preparation & Lock-In Check-in: 30 min in
13:00 4H candle close. Lock pairs with pending setups · Confirmed on previous 4H · Likely to trigger this candle. No bias switching. No emotional override. No new ideas.
CONFIRM
16:00–17:00
Window 3 — Confirmation Phase Check-in: 10–30 min in
Var1 confirmed setups · Previously pending setups triggering · Must align 4H cross · Only execute if setup already confirmed OR pending now provides trigger. Binary YES/NO only. No new idea hunting.
PREP
17:00–20:00
Window 4 — Preparation & Lock-In Check-in: 30 min in
17:00 4H candle close. Lock pairs: pending/confirmed on previous 4H · Likely to trigger · No bias switching. After 19:00: market may range — possible overnight expansion — check high-impact news — avoid forcing entries.
CONFIRM
20:00–21:00
Window 5 — Confirmation Phase Check-in: 10–30 min in
Var1 confirmed · Previously pending triggering · Must align 4H cross · Only execute if already confirmed OR pending now provides trigger. After 21:00 close: watch reversals · continuations · LQ sweeps · session shift manipulation. Be alert, not aggressive.
PREP
21:00–23:00
Window 6 — Final Lock-In Check-in: 30 min in
21:00 4H candle close. Final window. Lock pairs confirmed on 21:00 close · Watch: reversals · continuations · LQ sweeps · session shift manipulation. Be alert, not aggressive. No new entries after 22:30.
EOD
23:00+
End of Day — No New Trades
All positions closed or at breakeven. EOD review — log all trades, screenshot setups, assess execution quality. Prepare tomorrow's structural bias.
📋
Check-In Protocol (Mandatory): Every check-in must be done at the required time, logged with an exact EAT timestamp (HH:MM), and recorded on the dashboard tracker. Prep windows (13–16 / 17–20 / 21–23): check in 30 minutes in — purpose is lock-in only, no new bias. Confirm windows (12–13 / 16–17 / 20–21): check in 10–30 minutes in — binary YES/NO only, no new analysis permitted.
§7 Reference Images Upload annotated charts, structure diagrams, and setup examples for quick reference
📷
How to add reference images: Click "+ Add Image" below. Label each image (e.g. "CHoCH Setup", "30M Buildup Example", "OB+Gap Refinement"). Images are embedded directly into the downloaded HTML file — when you click ⬇ Download in the nav, your reference images are baked in as base64 and will appear automatically when you open that file, with no re-upload needed.
Supports PNG, JPG, WEBP · Click image to enlarge · Hover for delete
Pullback Trendline FIXED
MS & Break and Retest Trendlines FIXED
QML Trendline FIXED
5m–3d Variation — Pullback Zone FIXED
5M–3D Variation — Pullback Setup FIXED
No reference images yet — upload charts, annotated diagrams, or setup examples above.
Buildup Variation
Candle Buildup Reference — All Setup Types
📋 Reference Six buildup patterns that qualify as valid candle buildups across all setups — QML/CHoCH, MS, MS-Sweep, Multiple MS, Retest, and Opposing variations.
Click image to enlarge
Variation Types
1 QML / CHoCH Setup
Price makes a QML (Quasi Market Level) or Change of Character — buildup forms at the break zone before continuation.
2 MS Setup
Market Structure break — buildup forms at the structural violation level. Classic MS tap with candle accumulation before entry trigger.
3 MS — Sweep
MS violation with a sweep of liquidity — buildup forms after the sweep before the directional continuation candle triggers.
4 Multiple MS Setup
Multiple consecutive market structure breaks — buildup accumulates over several candles / structure levels before the entry candle.
5 Retest Setup
After structural violation price retests the broken level — buildup forms on the retest candles before the continuation trigger fires.
6 Opposing Setup
Opposing buildup against the primary direction — monitor closely. Valid signal in the opposing direction invalidates the original trade setup.
Key Rule A valid buildup must consist of candles that are clearly accumulating — no strong impulsive moves breaking structure. Any opposing buildup with a valid signal candle is an invalidation.
TRADING SETUP LIBRARY
Complete System Reference — Validations · Invalidations · Pivot Conditions · Variations
LQ Sweep
External POI Setup
⚡ Adjustment Must sweep LQ or have a structural violation — then require a valid signal candle or candle buildup at external POI
Context
Structural violation (MS/CHoCH/BOS) from previous or current day + tap into external POI.
✓ Validations
  • LQ swept OR structural violation confirmed
  • Valid signal candle at external POI
  • Valid signal candle OR candle buildup at POI
  • 30M CHoCH confirmation
✗ Invalidations
  • LQ not swept AND no structural violation
  • Invalid signal candle
  • No valid candle buildup
  • Opposing buildup with valid signal candle
⟲ Pivot Conditions
  • Pivot to RPC: Valid range + internal POI tap + signal candle + opposing buildup triggers first
  • Pivot to Pre-BOS: After LQ sweep — if price breaks the next structure level
Variations & Timing
VAR 1 Two Candles
Signal + next candle
  • 30M CHoCH early signal → trigger same candle
  • 30M CHoCH signal → trigger 2nd candle
  • 30M CHoCH 2nd candle → trigger same candle
VAR 2 Three Candles
Signal → no entry 2nd → entry 3rd. CHoCH in 1st or 2nd. Assess sweep/retest.
VAR 3 Four Candles
Asian signal → trigger NYK/PM
VAR 4 No Signal
No signal → next confirms swing → entry 3rd. Assess sweep/retest.
Watch For Targets · Opposing Buildups · Time Expiration
RPC Setup
Range Pullback · Internal POI
⚡ Adjustment Requires a clear defined range + valid pullback to internal POI — then a valid signal candle or valid candle buildup at POI
Context
After structural violation → new clear range created → pullback to internal POI (initiated by previous or current day).
✓ Validations
  • Clear defined range present
  • Valid pullback to internal POI confirmed
  • Valid signal candle at POI
  • Valid signal candle OR candle buildup at POI
  • Verified at 30M CHoCH
✗ Invalidations
  • No clear range (range not yet established)
  • Pullback to POI not confirmed
  • Invalid candle + pivot conditions buildup
  • Failed swing buildup
⟲ Pivot Conditions
  • Pivot to Failed Swing: When failed swing building up
  • Pivot to Pre-BOS Anchor: When structure leaves anchor
Variations & Timing
VAR 1 Two Candles
Signal + next candle (same 3 build patterns as LQ Var 1)
VAR 2 Three Candles
Signal → no entry 2nd → entry 3rd. CHoCH in 1st or 2nd. Assess sweep/retest.
VAR 3 Four/Five Candles
First/Asian signal → trigger Midday/NYK/PM
Pre BOS Anchor
Anchor-Based · HTF Violation
⚡ Adjustment Must sweep a swing or have a structure violation before the Pre-BOS Anchor setup is valid
Context
Current day confirms/partially/fully creates anchor for HTF structure violation. Note: Closely watch 30M POI that led to 4H break.
✓ Validations
  • Swing swept OR structure violation confirmed
  • Must have anchor OR creating anchor
  • Swept previous candle before break
✗ Invalidations
  • No swing swept AND no structure violation
  • Anchor not present or not forming
  • Opposing buildup with valid signal candle
⟲ Pivot Conditions
  • Pivot to LQ: Signal + valid CHoCH tested before initial setup
  • If not close, check for weak swing
  • Add Pivot to Pre-BOS: After LQ sweep — when price breaks the next structure level, pivot to Pre-BOS Anchor immediately
Variations
VAR 1 Sweep & Break in One
Violation candle also sweeps previous → next candle triggers
VAR 2 Anchor Ahead
Already have anchor ahead of violation → same or next candle triggers
VAR 3 Delayed Retest
Break with anchor → next doesn't provide entry → anticipate retest from following candles
Close at POI — Complex Buildup
Previous day violates structure and closes at POI → Next day provides setup
⚡ Adjustment — Variation Condition Previous day must have closed in a breakout — confirm this before selecting this setup. A close within range does not qualify.
1. NEW DAY CONFIRMS SWING
Context
Previous day doesn't create swing → new day confirms by 1st/2nd candle
✓ Validations
  • New day confirms swing by 1st or Asian candle
✗ Invalidations
  • No weak swing / equal swings
⟲ Pivots
  • To RPC: Signal + no weak swing
  • To Failed Swing: New failed swing created
Session Variants
Late London: Early sweep → London close for setup
Midday: Midday sweeps London/Asian → anticipate NY trigger
2. FAILED SWING
Context
Previous/new day confirms swing → failed swing created or building up
✓ Validations
  • Valid initial swing by selected candles
  • 30M weak swing / equal swings
  • No pivot conditions
✗ Invalidations
  • No valid initial swing by selected candles
  • No weak swing / equal swings
Variations
Var 1: Swing building. Signal shows failure.
Var 2: Anchor confirmed → next pullback triggers.
Var 3: Anchor confirmed → next doesn't trigger → delayed.
3. CONTINUATION
Context
New day creates opposing swing and ranges around 30M break block. Entry on next 4H bars.
Key Pattern
  • Opposing swing forms
  • Ranges around 30M break block
  • Wait for next 4H candle trigger
Entry Models & Signal Candle Types
Entry Trigger Reference — VAR1 · VAR2 · VAR3 · Anchor · Candle Types
📋 Reference Three entry variation models (VAR1, VAR2, VAR3) plus anchor entry, and the four valid signal candle types: Engulfment, Opposing Close, Pin, and Doji.
VAR1 — Signal Candle Then Entry
Signal candle forms at POI → entry on next candle. Valid with LQA+ / RPC+ / Failed Swing / PREBOS.
Click image to enlarge
VAR2 — Signal CDL Then No Entry · Third Entry
Signal candle forms but no entry on next candle → third candle provides the entry. Valid with LQ B+ / RPC B+ / Failed Swing VAR2 / PREBOS VAR2.
Click image to enlarge
VAR3 / Anchor — No Signal CDL · Next Candle Confirms
No signal candle → next candle confirms anchor entry on the following candle. Only LQ D+ valid. Also covers the 4th/5th candle continuation model for LQ C+ / RPC C+ / Failed Swing VAR3 / PREBOS VAR / New Day Confirms Swing / Continuation.
Click image to enlarge
Signal Candle Types
1 Engulfment
Signal candle fully engulfs the body of the previous candle in the opposing direction. Strongest signal type.
2 Opposing Close
Candle closes decisively in the opposing direction to the preceding move, showing rejection at the POI.
3 Pin
Long wick / pin bar showing sharp rejection — price sweeps past a level and closes well back inside range.
4 Doji
Near-equal open and close with wicks both sides — indecision candle valid as signal only in strong context.
Key Rule Signal candle type must match the entry variation model. VAR3 / Anchor entries require LQ D+ only. Always confirm buildup context before triggering entry.
5M 3D Variation Reference
5M Refinement · Distribution · Displacement · Delivery
📋 Reference The 5M 3D variation defines how price must present on the 5-minute timeframe before entry. All three phases — Distribution, Displacement, and Delivery — must be valid for the trade to qualify.
Distribution · Displacement · Delivery
1 · Distribution
Price consolidates or ranges at a key level. Liquidity builds above/below the range. No impulsive move yet.
2 · Displacement
Sharp, impulsive move away from the range — sweeps liquidity and creates the displacement candle or series.
3 · Delivery
Price retraces into the displacement zone — the entry POI. Entry signal forms here. Continuation expected.
Your 5M 3D Reference Chart
📸
Tap to upload your 5M 3D variation reference image
Validation Rule All three 3D phases must be present on the 5M chart. Missing any phase — especially Displacement — invalidates the 5M refinement. Do not enter without confirmed delivery into POI.

Behaviour Insights — Invalidation & Review
🟩 Session × Pair Heatmap Win rate & net R per pair per session window — find your edge by time & pair
📅 Rule Break Calendar Daily discipline — green = clean, amber = 1 break, red = 2+ breaks. Spot your problem days
🎓 Trade Grade Breakdown Win rate & avg R per grade (A/B/C) — are your C-trades killing your R?
✕ Invalidation Log Most common stand-down reasons — discipline vs hesitation breakdown
◎ Breakeven Rate Analysis How often do you BE, which setups/sessions produce most BEs, and are you pulling the trigger too early?
⬖ Partial Close Outcomes Did taking partials help or hurt? Trades with vs without partials — avg R comparison
📰 News Event Outcomes How high-impact news actually affected your trades — discipline vs over-caution
🧠 Emotion vs Outcome Win rate & avg R per emotional state at trade close — from PTR
🎯 Setup Performance Win rate, avg R:R and PnL per setup type
📊 Discipline vs Outcome Checklist completion % vs daily PnL — last 20 trading days

🌙 Post-18:00 EAT Performance Separate tracking of late-session setups — aggressive pullbacks, 5–6R failure rate
🧘 Mood vs Outcome Pre-session mood correlated with win rate and rule adherence

    THE GOOSE AI
    Intelligence Layer · Season 2
    ● LIVE NOW
    2 features active · 6 in development
    Your trading edge, amplified. AI-powered coaching, pattern recognition, and real-time analysis — built directly into your workflow.
    Active Features
    📊
    Pre-Session Brief
    AI market overview before each session. Analyses your pair biases, session windows, and news events to generate a personalised daily brief.
    ● Live
    🧠
    Checklist Coach
    AI reviews your session checklist and suggests missing items or refinements based on ICT/SMC methodology and your setup types.
    ● Live
    Coming Soon
    🔍
    Trade Autopsy
    After each closed trade, AI dissects execution quality, checklist compliance, and management decisions. Tells you exactly what to do differently.
    Coming Soon
    Q2 2025
    📈
    Pattern Detector
    Scans your trade history to surface recurring patterns — emotional triggers, setup win rates by session window, and equity curve inflection points.
    Coming Soon
    Q2 2025
    🗣
    EOD Voice Coach
    At 23:00 EAT, AI reads your day and generates a spoken or written coaching note — celebrating wins, flagging rule breaks, and setting tomorrow's focus.
    Coming Soon
    Q3 2025
    ⚡
    Live News Analyser
    When high-impact news fires, AI instantly assesses impact on your open pairs, suggests SL management, and flags if your setup thesis is invalidated.
    Coming Soon
    Q3 2025
    🏆
    Weekly Review Assistant
    AI generates your full weekly review — win rate trends, missed opportunity cost, discipline score, and a prioritised improvement plan for next week.
    Coming Soon
    Q3 2025
    🎯
    Setup Grader
    Upload a chart screenshot and AI grades the setup quality — confluence score, entry timing, SL placement, and whether the trade fits your system rules.
    Coming Soon
    Q4 2025
    ⚙ API Configuration
    All AI features use your own Anthropic API key — stored locally in this file, never sent anywhere except Anthropic's servers. One key unlocks everything.
    💬 Suggest a Feature
    What AI feature would most improve your trading? Ideas are reviewed and prioritised for the roadmap.
    ✓ Idea saved — thank you!
    🎯
    Milestone Hit!
    —
    —
    🪿 Messages
    —
    Quick:
    #

    ⏰ Set Reminder

    Or custom minutes:
    📰
    News Check Required
    High-impact news within 30 minutes — review open positions
    High-impact news releases in the next 30 minutes. Review all open positions — move stops to breakeven if needed. You can also add any additional events below.
    ✓ Event added
    No events added yet
    Events will appear in the news calendar and as pair-specific warnings in the checklist.
    ⚡
    15 MIN
    —
    —
    Review open positions · Move to breakeven if needed
    Field EDITING
    PRE-ENTRY PAUSE
    —
    Take one more look.
    Is the setup still valid? Is your SL placed correctly?
    Is this the right moment?
    Timer duration:
    ✦ AI Checklist Suggestions
    — checking key…
    How it works: The AI reviews your full current checklist and suggests new items you may be missing — gaps in analysis, execution blind spots, or psychology checks.

    Select a section to focus on, or leave on "All sections" for a full review. Add an optional note about a specific weakness to get targeted suggestions.

    API key: Set your key once via ⋯ → AI Key in the top-right menu. It's stored on this device only and auto-loaded for all AI features.
    ✦ AI Key Settings
    Anthropic API Key
    Your key is stored only in localStorage on this device and sent directly to Anthropic — never to any third party.
    Get a key at console.anthropic.com → API Keys → Create Key.
    🎙 Voice Note
    Press record to start
    📋 Yesterday
    Loading…
    📸 Screenshot Manager
    —
    Select a pair and section above.
    🔁 Trade Replay
    🪿 The Goose AI — Pre-Session Brief
    — checking key…
    Click Generate Brief to get an AI summary of your last 3 sessions — recent patterns, mistakes to avoid, and focus areas for today.
    🔔 Notification Settings
    Browser Notifications
    —
    4H Candle Close
    10 min before each close (01,05,09,13,17,21 EAT)
    Trade Window Opens
    At 13:00, 17:00, 21:00 EAT
    Morning Routine Reminder
    At 10:00 EAT
    Repeat if Incomplete
    Keep reminding until morning routine is done
    EOD Review Reminder
    Custom time each day
    🌙 EOD Repeat Until Done
    Repeat every N min from 23:00 EAT until EOD is submitted
    ⏰ 4H Check-In Repeat Until Done
    Repeat every N min inside the check-in window until stamped
    Drawdown Alert
    Notify when drawdown exceeds threshold
    Session Notifications
    Session Open Alert
    Message + push when each trade window opens (12:00, 13:00, 16:00, 17:00, 20:00, 21:00 EAT)
    Session Close Warning
    5-minute warning before each window closes — includes check-in status
    News Notifications
    News Interval Alert
    Repeat reminder during trading hours if news events are approaching
